depression.description: I feel so anxious and guilty because I can't be there for Jersey as much as I want to. It's hard to focus on my own life when I worry about her recovery.
I get so angry and irritated with Ashby for not cleaning up after herself. I feel like my needs are being ignored, and it makes me question why I even help her.

depression.topic: Guilt over not being supportive enough
depression.description: Whenever I talk to Jersey, I feel this deep sadness because I know I've been stressed with my own issues. I worry that she must feel disappointed in me for not being a better friend.

depression.topic: Feeling unworthy of love and support
depression.description: I often think that no one really likes me, no matter how much I try to help others. This belief makes me feel even more isolated and worthless.
I struggle to put my own needs first because I feel like I should always be there for others. It's exhausting, and I end up feeling drained and unappreciated.
